info.name: HashiCorp Vault Vault Secrets Engines API
KV V2
HashiCorp Vault Read KV v2 engine configuration

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

items.docs: Retrieves the configuration for the KV v2 secrets engine at the given mount path.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Configure KV v2 engine

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

items.docs: Configures backend-level settings for the KV v2 secrets engine.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Read KV v2 secret

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

params.name: path
params.description: Path to the secret within the secrets engine

params.name: version
params.description: Version number to read

items.docs: Reads the value of the secret at the specified path. Returns the current version by default, or a specific version if the version parameter is provided.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Create or update KV v2 secret

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

params.name: path
params.description: Path to the secret within the secrets engine

items.docs: Creates a new version of a secret at the specified path. If the secret does not exist, it will be created.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Delete latest version of KV v2 secret

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

params.name: path
params.description: Path to the secret within the secrets engine

items.docs: Performs a soft delete of the latest version of the secret at the specified path. The data can be recovered using the undelete endpoint.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Delete specific versions of KV v2 secret

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

params.name: path
params.description: Path to the secret within the secrets engine

items.docs: Performs a soft delete of the specified versions of a secret. The data can be recovered using the undelete endpoint.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Undelete versions of KV v2 secret

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

params.name: path
params.description: Path to the secret within the secrets engine

items.docs: Restores soft-deleted versions of a secret.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Destroy versions of KV v2 secret

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

params.name: path
params.description: Path to the secret within the secrets engine

items.docs: Permanently destroys the specified versions of a secret. This action is irreversible.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Read KV v2 secret metadata

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

params.name: path
params.description: Path to the secret within the secrets engine

items.docs: Returns metadata and version history for the secret at the specified path.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Update KV v2 secret metadata

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

params.name: path
params.description: Path to the secret within the secrets engine

items.docs: Updates metadata settings for the secret at the specified path.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Delete KV v2 secret metadata and all versions

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

params.name: path
params.description: Path to the secret within the secrets engine

items.docs: Permanently deletes the secret metadata and all version data for the specified path. This is irreversible.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault List KV v2 secrets

params.name: mount
params.description: Mount path for the secrets engine (e.g., secret, kv)

items.docs: Returns a list of secret keys at the specified path.

info.name: AWS
HashiCorp Vault Generate AWS credentials

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the role

items.docs: Generates dynamic AWS access credentials based on the named role.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Read AWS role

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the role

items.docs: Reads the configuration for the named AWS role.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Create or update AWS role

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the role

items.docs: Creates or updates the named AWS role.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Delete AWS role

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the role

items.docs: Deletes the named AWS role.

info.name: Database
HashiCorp Vault Generate database credentials

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the database role

items.docs: Generates dynamic database credentials based on the named role.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Read database role

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the role

items.docs: Reads the configuration for the named database role.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Create or update database role

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the role

items.docs: Creates or updates the named database role.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Delete database role

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the role

items.docs: Deletes the named database role.

info.name: PKI
HashiCorp Vault Issue certificate

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the PKI role

items.docs: Generates a new certificate based on the named role. The private key is returned in the response.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Read CA certificate

items.docs: Returns the CA certificate in PEM format.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Read PKI role

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the PKI role

items.docs: Reads the configuration for the named PKI role.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Create or update PKI role

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the PKI role

items.docs: Creates or updates the named PKI role.

info.name: Transit
HashiCorp Vault Encrypt data

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the encryption key

items.docs: Encrypts the provided plaintext using the named encryption key.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Decrypt data

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the encryption key

items.docs: Decrypts the provided ciphertext using the named encryption key.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Read transit encryption key

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the encryption key

items.docs: Returns information about the named encryption key.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Create transit encryption key

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the encryption key

items.docs: Creates a new named encryption key.

info.name: HashiCorp Vault Delete transit encryption key

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the encryption key

items.docs: Deletes the named encryption key. The key must have deletion allowed set to true.

info.name: SSH
HashiCorp Vault Sign SSH key

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the SSH role

items.docs: Signs the provided public key using the named SSH role.
